turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 85-1239, Amoco Production Company versus Village of Gambell and a related case will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: JUSTICE WHITE
turns.text: This case is here from the Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit and as the opinion on file with the Clerk indicates, we reverse the judgment of the Ninth Circuit in part, vacate in part, and remand the case for further proceedings. Justice Stevens joined by Justice Scalia has filed an opinion concurring in part and concurring in the judgment.
